title: onosma angustiloba
intro: Onosma angustiloba, a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, is also known as the narrow-leaved golden ragwort. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to induce vomiting and purging, which has led to its traditional use in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Onosma angustiloba include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit anti-inflammatory properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, with some sources also using it in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as fever and indigestion.
